productDisplayName: Jockey SP-OW Men White Muscle Innerwear Vest SP11
description: Style Notebasics from jockey will never disappoint. This performance stretch vest is engineered with a Quick-Dry fabric that'll help handle sweat when you're indulging in gym or sport activities. It wicks sweat away from your skin to keep it cool and dry. Wear this inside that cotton shirt - it'll help you stay warm when the AC's too cold and wicks sweat away during summer. This can even be worn with track pants and a sweatshirt for early morning jogs!Product DetailsWhite sleeveless vest, has white mesh panels at the shoulder that run to the hem sides and branded print on the chestMaterial and CareCotton/elastaneMachine wash delicate at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach, iron or dry cleanFlat dry in shade
